commands.review_summary:
The branch carries resolved heartbeat target chat type into heartbeat response-tool selection, consults model-specific harness runtime policy, and adds heartbeat regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can bypass message_tool_only for heartbeat runs when the configured group/channel policy is only messages.groupChat.visibleReplies. I did not live-replay the Discord scheduled turn.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed because I found no discrete code defect in the patch; the blocker is contributor/maintainer proof and review for a security-sensitive channel-output path.
